# Chapter 12: Biocompatibility and medical devices  (~90 pp)
- 12.1 What biocompatibility means in practice (12) · 12.2 Material-tissue interactions (12) · 12.3 Implant failure modes (15) · 12.4 Drug-device combinations (10) · 12.5 Sterilisation and packaging (10) · 12.6 Regulatory framework (FDA, EMA) for medical devices (15) · 12.7 Failure section: Therac-25 (software), Bjork-Shiley heart valve, hip implants (16)

**Archetype**: failure, ethics, interface. **Project**: read a real device 510(k) submission; identify hidden engineering choices. **Exercises**: 25.
